meta.description: Group message statistics ranking (supports day/week/month/year and custom ranges)
command.help.stats:
/stats - Today
/stats 5h - Last 5 hours
/stats 4d - Last 4 days
/stats 3w - Last 3 weeks
/stats 2m - Last 2 months
/stats 1y - Last 1 year
/stats 2026-02-25 - Specific date
/stats 2026/02/25 - Specific date
/stats 20260225 - Specific date
error.stats_group_only: This statistics command is only available in groups.
dragon.empty:
Dragon King Leaderboard

No Dragon King statistics yet
result.dragon_congrats: Congratulations {display_name} for becoming the 🐉 Dragon King (streak {streak_days} days)
cutoff.title: Stats Day Boundary Settings
cutoff.description:
The day boundary determines when "today" starts and ends, and also when the Dragon King is settled.
For example, if set to 4:00, today's stats start at 4:00 and the Dragon King is settled at 4:00.
cutoff.permission_required: You need "Change Group Info" permission to modify this setting.
